description: Array interface for FLAC interface node.

functions.name: area
functions.description: (3D only) Get the effective area of the interface node.

functions.name: disp
functions.description: Get array with node displacement (dim = 3 in 3D and dim = 2 in 2D).

functions.name: disp_shear
functions.description: Get array with node shear displacement (dim = 3 in 3D and dim = 2 in 2D).

functions.name: in_group
functions.description: Return interface node group membership as a boolean array.

functions.name: normal
functions.description: Get array with node normal (dim = 3 in 3D and dim = 2 in 2D).

functions.name: of_interface
functions.description: Return interface node of interface with 'name' as boolean array.

functions.name: penetration
functions.description: Get array with node penetration.

functions.name: porepressure
functions.description: Get array with node porepressure.

functions.name: pos
functions.description: Get array with node position (dim = 3 in 3D and dim = 2 in 2D).

functions.name: prop_scalar
functions.description: Return an array of the property `prop_name` for each interface node. Only properties of type double are supported by this function.

functions.name: set_disp_shear
functions.description: Set node shear displacement (dim = 3 in 3D and dim = 2 in 2D).

functions.name: set_group
functions.signature: itasca.interfacenodearray.set_group(membership: array bool{interface}, group_name: str, slot="default") -> None
functions.description: Set interface node group from an array. Where membership True set the corresponding interface node to be a member of group group_name in the given slot.

functions.name: set_pos
functions.description: Set node position (dim = 3 in 3D and dim = 2 in 2D).

functions.name: set_prop_scalar
functions.description: Set the property `prop_name` of each interface node. The input array should be size of (nnodes).

functions.name: set_slip
functions.description: Set slip status (0-2).

functions.name: set_stress_shear
functions.description: Set shear stress vector of the node (dim = 3 in 3D and dim = 2 in 2D).

functions.name: set_tol
functions.description: Set node tolerance.

functions.name: set_vel
functions.description: Set velocities of the nodes (dim = 3 in 3D and dim = 2 in 2D).

functions.name: slip
functions.description: Get array with slip status (0-2).

functions.name: stress_normal
functions.description: Get array with normal stress of the node.

functions.name: stress_shear
functions.description: Get array with shear stress vector of the node (dim = 3 in 3D and dim = 2 in 2D).

functions.name: tol
functions.description: Get array with node tolerance.

functions.name: vel
functions.description: Get array with velocity of the node (dim = 3 in 3D and dim = 2 in 2D).
